title: Managed secret rotation and emergency revocation are not implemented
evidence: Internal assertions are short-lived and server-only, but use one symmetric secret with no key ID or rotation procedure.
resolution: Implement managed environment-separated secrets with documented normal/emergency rotation and overlap or coordinated cutover.
verification: Rotation drill proves old credentials stop working and no secret appears in browser/build/log output.

title: Retention and deletion enforcement is absent
evidence: Provider envelopes, facts, alerts, actions, identity records, and audit records have no scheduled field/source-aware deletion implementation.
resolution: Implement approved retention configuration deletion inventory dry-run approval tombstones and deletion audit.
verification: Database tests prove expiry tenant/provider deletion restore suppression and audit evidence.

title: Commercial provider rights and attribution controls are unresolved
evidence: FT-301 rights SLA price trial and final decision records remain pending; public terms cannot authorize the adapter.
deadline_gate: Before commercial credentials or payloads enter a shared environment
resolution: Map every accepted or exception contract response to an enforceable UI storage export AI and deletion control.
verification: Legal approval plus passing FT-301 completion validator and provider-specific contract/control tests.

title: Alert assignee tenant integrity is not enforced by the database
evidence: The store validates same-operator active assignees but alerts.assigned_identity_id references auth_identities without operator_id.
resolution: Add operator-scoped referential integrity or an equivalent database invariant without weakening store checks.
verification: PostGIS test proves direct and API cross-tenant assignment fail while valid assignment succeeds.

title: Production browser security headers are not configured
evidence: apps/web/next.config.ts configures standalone output only; CSP framing MIME referrer and permissions policies are absent.
deadline_gate: Before any preview URL is shared outside the team
resolution: Define environment-compatible CSP and security headers without exposing API or identity secrets.
verification: Browser/header smoke test verifies the approved header set and Clerk/BFF/SSE behavior.

title: Commercial ingestion abuse and quarantine controls are undefined
evidence: NOAA is bounded and normalized but no selected-provider adapter yet defines size rate schema poison-message quarantine or backlog limits.
resolution: Specify and implement bounded parsing rate limits rejection/quarantine metrics replay safety and operator-visible degradation.
verification: Adversarial fixture and FT-402 drills prove bounded memory retries quarantine and recovery.

title: Audit access retention export and privileged-action monitoring are incomplete
evidence: Alert and authorization audit rows exist but no approved audit-reader export redaction integrity review or suspicious-action alerting exists.
resolution: Implement tenant-scoped audit review/export with redaction retention controls and alerts for membership/session/high-risk action anomalies.
verification: Authorization tests export review and an incident drill prove access and integrity.

title: Backup restore and deletion-tombstone procedures are untested
evidence: No managed database backup configuration restore evidence RPO/RTO or restore-time revocation/deletion replay exists.
resolution: Implement encrypted isolated backups retention tombstones and a controlled restore runbook.
verification: Restore drill records RPO/RTO PostGIS migrations tenant counts revocations and deleted-data non-resurrection.

title: Advisory and environment language is not persistent across the console
evidence: Flight detail is explicit and footer says simulation but alert queue and no-selection states lack a persistent limitation; live environment label is not modeled.
resolution: Approve exact advisory wording and render a persistent environment/source authority label in every operational state.
verification: UI tests and Legal/Product/operator review cover queue detail empty loading degraded and error states.

title: Public health probes expose more operational detail than a minimal external liveness contract
evidence: Health and readiness are unauthenticated and include service version checks and worker details.
resolution: Keep load-balancer probes minimal or private and move detailed diagnostics behind authenticated or network-restricted access.
verification: External-origin smoke test sees only approved minimal fields while operators retain protected diagnostics.
